message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1980 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13326","justification":"German General Social Survey with modules on political attitudes, government, and social structure in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1980; covers domestic and international political orientations and is a core German dataset for the 1980s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1982 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13327","justification":"Nationally representative survey for West Germany in 1982 including political interest, trust in institutions, attitudes toward government and political system; useful for government and political systems in Germany in the early 1980s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1984 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13328","justification":"Includes questions on political opinions, party preferences, views on democracy and the state in Germany in 1984; relevant to government, political systems and international issues in the Cold War context."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1986 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13329","justification":"Covers political participation, trust in political institutions, perceptions of international tensions and security issues in mid‑1980s West Germany; links to conflict, security and peace as well as government and political systems."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1988 (German General Social Survey)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13330","justification":"Focuses on political attitudes and evaluations of democracy, parties and government in Germany in 1988; relevant for studying German domestic and international political orientations before the end of the Cold War."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1980 (Political Attitudes in the Federal Republic of Germany 1980)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1449","justification":"Survey of political attitudes in West Germany in 1980 including views on parties, government, NATO, East‑West conflict and security issues; directly tied to conflict, security and peace and government/political systems."},{"title":"Bundeswehr und Sicherheitspolitik 1984 (Federal Armed Forces and Security Policy 1984)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1249","justification":"German survey on attitudes towards the Bundeswehr, NATO, disarmament and security policy in 1984; strongly linked to conflict, security and peace and international politics in Germany during the Cold War."},{"title":"Außenpolitische Einstellungen der Bundesbürger 1983 (Foreign Policy Attitudes of West German Citizens 1983)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA1316","justification":"Examines German public opinion on international organisations (e.g. NATO, EC), East‑West relations, and foreign policy; directly relevant to international politics and organisations in Germany in the 1980s."},{"title":"Bundestagswahl 1987 – Vor- und Nachwahl-Querschnitt (German Federal Election 1987 Pre- and Post-election Cross Section)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13526","justification":"German National Election Study for the 1987 Bundestag election; contains rich information on political behaviour, party choice, evaluations of government and democracy, and attitudes to security and foreign policy."},{"title":"Eurobarometer Trend File 1970–2002 (subsetting Germany in the 1980s)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10040","justification":"Includes repeated cross‑section surveys covering Germany in the 1980s on European integration, international organisations (EC/EU, NATO), security, peace and economic development; German subsamples can be extracted for the 1980s."}]}
